summary: A large industrial-style factory building with a rectangular footprint, featuring a prominent tall chimney/smokestack on the left side. The main structure is 4 stories tall with wood plank walls, stonebrick trim and foundation, and multiple regularly-spaced window openings. The roof features a flat design with overhanging eaves. A smaller auxiliary structure is visible to the right. The building sits on a dirt foundation with scattered white concrete blocks around the perimeter.

shape.overall_form: Rectangular main block with attached tall chimney tower on left side; smaller rectangular annex structure to the right
shape.symmetry: Asymmetrical due to chimney placement; main facade shows regular window grid pattern

elements: regular grid of window openings (approximately 3x4 per visible face)
overhanging roof eaves with stepped detail
auxiliary smaller structure attached to right side
rebuild_hints: Main walls constructed from wood planks in vertical orientation
Stonebrick used for horizontal trim bands separating each floor level
Windows are regularly spaced in a 3-wide by 4-tall grid pattern on main facade
Chimney is a tall rectangular tower with stepped/tiered cap at top, positioned on left side
Roof is flat with pronounced overhanging eaves on all sides
Foundation consists of stonebrick base with concrete block perimeter markers
Smaller annex structure on right side appears to be 2-3 stories with similar material palette
Interior floor visible in close-up shows wood plank construction
Stonebrick corner pillars provide structural definition
Roof cap features decorative stepped/layered detail
uncertainties: Exact interior layout and room configuration not visible
Whether chimney is functional or decorative
Precise window frame material (appears to be dark, possibly dark oak or similar)
Exact dimensions of annex structure and its connection to main building
Whether the building has a basement or additional underground levels
Specific purpose of the structure (factory, mill, warehouse, or other industrial use)
Interior floor count may differ from exterior appearance due to ceiling heights
